Name: Coital_Act_Rate
Description: The probability of a coital act occurring at each time step.

Name: Condom_Usage_Probability
Description:
The structure that determines the probability of condom usage over time in a relationship type. The probability follows a sigmoidal curve, as defined by the following parameters:

Min
The minimum asymptote (0 to 1, default 1).
Max
The maximum asymptote (0 to 1, default 1).
Mid
The year of the inflection point (0 to 3.40282e+038, default 2000).
Rate
The rate proportional to the slope at the inflection point (-100 to 100, default is 1).

Name: Duration_Weibull_Heterogeneity
Description: Inverse of the Weibull shape (1/kappa) parameter of relationship duration in years.

Name: Duration_Weibull_Scale
Description: Weibull scale parameter of relationship duration in years.

Name: Max
Description: The maximum asymptote (unit of probability) for sigmoidal curve. This parameter is included in the sigmoid utility class, which is currently used with the HIV sim type for the Formation_Rate_Sigmoid and Condom_Usage_Probability parameters.

Name: Mid
Description: The year of the inflection point for sigmoidal curve. This parameter is included in the sigmoid utility class, which is currently used with the HIV sim type for the Formation_Rate_Sigmoid and Condom_Usage_Probability parameters.

Name: Migration_Actions
Description:
A list of what relationship action to take when one member of the relationship migrates to another node. The order in which they are listed corresponds to the probability values in **Migration_Actions_Distributions**. **Migration_Model** in the configuration file must be set to FIXED_RATE_MIGRATION. Possible values are:


Terminate
Relationship is stopped. The individual's relationship count is decremented so they can enter new relationships.
Pause
Relationship is put on hold. The couple is not in the same node so they cannot consummate their relationship, but the individual's relationship count is not decremented since they are still in the relationship. The relationship can resume if both partners are in the same node, which need not be their home node. Relationship duration timers continue and relationship could terminate while paused.
Migrate
Partners in the relationship migrate simultaneously and continue the relationship. Person migrating tells their partner to cancel all of their relationships and migrate during the current time step. This avoids a cascade of people migration.

Name: Migration_Actions_Distribution
Description: A list of the proportion of relationships that take a given action when one member of the relationship migrates. The sum of all values must be 1 and the order of the list corresponds to the order in **Migration_Actions**. **Migration_Model** in the configuration file must be set to FIXED_RATE_MIGRATION.

Name: Min
Description: The minimum asymptote (unit of probability) for sigmoidal curve. This parameter is included in the sigmoid utility class, which is currently used with the HIV sim type for the Formation_Rate_Sigmoid and Condom_Usage_Probability parameters.

Name: Rate
Description: The rate (probability/year) proportional to the slope at the inflection point of sigmoidal curve. This parameter is included in the sigmoid utility class, which is currently used with the HIV sim type for the Formation_Rate_Sigmoid and Condom_Usage_Probability parameters.

Name: Relationship_Parameters
Description: The structure that determines basic aspects of the relationship, such as duration, condom usage, or how to handle migration.
